title: Personal Names,
content:
There was a great swell in Japan,
     Whose name on a Tuesday began;
        It lasted through Sunday
        Till twilight on Monday,
     And sounded like stones in a can.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Personal Names,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
